posts.hook: a single ai model now generates the video and drives the robot that builds it
posts.caption: flux 3 launched as one model for video, image, and audio and already drives factory robots, anthropic and openai both shipped voice-controlled agents the same day, and google says it now has $811 billion in contracted ai spending. full digest at sift.yasint.dev (link in bio)

slides.title: black forest labs launched flux 3, a single model for video, image, and audio
slides.desc: it beats runway, seedance, and gemini omni, and a variant already drives robots on audi's line

slides.title: claude's voice mode now runs on opus and sonnet with real tool access
slides.desc: it can now act inside gmail, slack, and canva mid-conversation

slides.title: openai shipped voice control to the desktop the same day
slides.desc: speak a command and it drives your mac, pc, or multiple agents at once

slides.title: google says it has $811 billion in contracted future ai spending
slides.desc: that's up roughly $500 billion from march, already bigger than its cloud backlog

slides.title: stripe is reportedly in talks to buy openrouter for about $10 billion
slides.desc: that's more than 7x the $1.3 billion pitchbook valued it at in may

slides.title: figma's agents now review every pull request and guard its code
slides.desc: a year-long rollout audits a decade-old monorepo under one policy

slides.title: namecheap handed a customer's account to an unverified caller
slides.desc: support changed his password and email after just a phone call
